title: 3D Cassette Tapes
description: Replaces music discs with simple cassettes
body:
This is a resource pack that replaces the models and textures of all music discs with a simple cassette. The names of the items have been changed to "Cassette Tape" for US English as well.

This pack is compatible with all 1.20 and 1.21 versions, you just won't have the newer discs available to the older versions.
